# Size

**Data field**

A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the size in bytes of the atom structure.

## Data fields

- **Type**: A 32-bit unsigned integer value.
- **Version**: One byte.
- **Flags**: Three bytes.
- **nextItemID**: A 32-bit unsigned integer indicating the value to use for the item ID of the next item created or assigned an item ID.
